nodes.name: Alethe
nodes.summary: Alethe（Alethe）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如White-tailed alethe、Fire-crested alethe。

nodes.name: Fire-crested alethe
nodes.summary: Fire-crested alethe（Alethe castanea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Fire-crested alethe。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 奈及利亞
nodes.summary: 奈及利亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联144种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Black guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等144种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Fire-crested alethe
nodes.summary: The fire-crested alethe (Alethe castanea) is a species of bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae. It is found in central Africa, from Nigeria to Uganda. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It has been recently split from the white-tailed alethe (A. diademata). References
